comment.body:
Does she mean VIX? Or implied volatility of all options? There’s an indicator in Tradestation that is “Impl Volta- All opts” that might be practical to use on SPY to show if volatility is suppressed or not? One thing that is missing is I don’t know how to practically look for or apply the things Alma says. Here’s an paper on the indicators:

https://cdn.tradestation.com/uploads/Using-Statistical-and-Implied-Volatility-in-Trading.pdf
